rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for all AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit unsafe Boolean range clauses unless port is explicitly AGREE bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
Model Analyst Agent extracted structure details
